requirements: exists(tree, 'verify accuracy') and executed_by(tree, 'verify accuracy', 'telephone company')
precedence(tree, 'enable simCard usage', 'activate simCard') and executed_by(tree, 'activate simCard', 'telephone company')
precedence(tree, 'retrieve personal data', 'obtain consent') and executed_by(tree, 'obtain consent', 'data controller')
